similarweb.total_visits: Insufficient data — SimilarWeb returned 403 error (CloudFront block); direct platform access not available
top_countries: United States (primary — US-only DTC brand, Walmart retail distribution confirmed)
similarweb.data_note: SimilarWeb access was blocked by CloudFront (403 error) during collection on 2026-03-20. Semrush also returned no public data. Tier assigned based on proxy signals.

proxy_signals.product_count_source: Verified on /collections/all — 3 cat litter formulas (Healthy Cat, Multi-Cat, Unscented), Wood Pellets, Litter Mat, Scoop, Biodegradable Pet Waste Bags, Yeoww Catnip Banana Toy, Gift Cards
proxy_signals.review_count: 8,000+ total site-wide (announced in site header); Multi-Cat formula: 5,239 reviews (Yotpo); Healthy Cat: 2,151; Unscented: 1,093; Scoop: 572; Waste Bags: 172; Mat: 110; Catnip Toy: 104
proxy_signals.review_source: Yotpo widget confirmed on PDP (/products/cat-litter-multi-cat-formula) — 'Trusted reviews by Yotpo' branding visible in accessibility tree; star ratings displayed on /collections/all product cards
proxy_signals.instagram_handle: @catalystpet (instagram.com/catalystpet — confirmed via footer link and web search result showing 18K followers)
app_list: Microsoft Clarity (session recording — detected in script src)
proxy_signals.blog_posts: ~100+ posts across 17 paginated pages (5-6 posts/page) in 5 categories: Revolutionary Stories, Litter Tips, Shelter/Rescue, Cat-Fluencers, Eco-Friendly
proxy_signals.blog_source: Verified on /blogs/news — pagination shows pages 1 through 17
proxy_signals.subscription_source: Confirmed on PDP /products/cat-litter-multi-cat-formula — 'Subscribe & Save' vs 'One-Time Purchase' toggle; multiple delivery cadences shown (Every Month 10lb, Every 2 Months 20lb, Every 4 Months 40lb); dedicated nav links: /pages/subscribe, /pages/how-to-use, /pages/modifying-your-subscription
proxy_signals.estimated_revenue: $2M–$8M ARR (estimated — DTC subscription + Walmart retail; softwood litter subscription at ~$23–$49/month per customer)

tier_narrative: Catalyst Pet is a mid-market US DTC pet brand in the growth-to-scale tier. While direct SimilarWeb data was unavailable (platform blocked), strong proxy signals indicate meaningful traffic: 8,000+ verified Yotpo reviews across 9 products, a 17-page blog with 100+ posts, 18K Instagram followers (@catalystpet), active subscription program with multiple SKUs, and Walmart nationwide retail distribution (announced in site header). The tech stack depth — 17+ apps including Triple Whale (attribution at scale), ReCharge (subscriptions), Gorgias (support), Hotjar and Lucky Orange (dual CRO analytics), and TikTok/Pinterest pixels — is consistent with a brand spending meaningfully on paid acquisition and retention. Estimated monthly sessions: 30K–80K (Tier 2–3 boundary). SimilarWeb data should be manually checked when platform access is restored.
